name: Jhon Keneth Ryan Namias
title: Full Stack Engineer & AI Automation Specialist
summary: Full Stack Engineer and AI Automation Specialist dedicated to building intelligent systems that drive efficiency. I specialize in bridging the gap between robust software architecture and the next generation of AI-driven workflows. My expertise is rooted in full-stack development, prompt engineering, and end-to-end automation. Currently serving as the Project Manager at MASH and the Head of the Technical Committee at the University of Caloocan City, where I lead technical strategy and cross-functional teams. My experience ranges from engineering automation tools for global firms like Wilshire Financial Network to building scalable backend systems. I am particularly passionate about the intersection of AI and productivity, having developed custom solutions using Eleven Labs and LLM integration to transform manual operations into streamlined, automated processes.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
